utility_evaluation.REASONING: Required format lists 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, total_budget. The final solution includes all six sections. Now check each for full specification: 1) property: includes selected property with details and price (name, address, price, features, fees, taxes, accessibility) — fully specified. 2) financing: includes financing solution with terms — provided (cash purchase, terms). 3) legal_services: includes legal services with costs — provided (itemized and total). 4) moving_services: includes moving arrangements with costs — provided (service type and cost). 5) setup_services: includes utility and setup services — provided (survey type/cost, utility package and setup cost). 6) total_budget: complete cost breakdown — provided with line items and grand total. All six items are present and fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final property solution includes selections across several categories. We must match each selected item to the exact corresponding item name in the ground-truth ratings and return the numeric rating. The property itself is a specific condo not listed in the ground-truth property options, so no rating exists for it. The financing solution explicitly chooses Cash Purchase, which maps to purchase_financing -> Cash Purchase with rating 10. Legal services choose Basic Legal Package with rating 8. Moving services choose Standard Moving Service, which corresponds to Standard Moving with rating 7. Setup services choose Basic Survey (rating 8) and Basic Utilities Package (Basic Utilities) with rating 6.
